ORDER DENYING MOTION TO MODIGY JUDGMENT FILED. COURT FINDS FAILURE TO PAY THE JUNE 15, 1993,PAYMENT WAS DUE TO MISTAKE AND OR NEGLECT OF DEFT'S COUNSEL. DENFENSE COUNCIL IS ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL $1200 AS REASONABLE ATTY FEES FOR THIS MOTION PAYABLE W/IN 10 COURT DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE JUNE 15 & JULY 15 PAYMENTS PURS TO THE STIP. WERE ORDERED IN OPEN COURT TO BE REMITTED FORTH WITH
